arts.ttl: Gareth Ainsworth outlines the role of his latest Shrewsbury Town additions
arts.sum: But Stewart is not the only player to come from non-league as Ricardo Dinanga joined from Shropshire rivals AFC Telford United - he had scored 12 goals in 28 games for the Bucks this season. Salop have added three players to their squad so far this month.

arts.ttl: Shrewsbury Town injury round-up - Aaron Pierre 'not as bad as first feared'
arts.sum: Morgan Feeney and Alex Gilliead also picked up injuries in the game against Phil Parkinson's side, with both players coming off. But in the cross-border derby last week, defender Aaron Pierre picked up a hamstring injury in the first half.

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic boss ‘very confident’ of defender agreeing new deal
arts.sum: Charlton Athletic manager Nathan Jones is “very confident” that the club will be able to agree a contract extension with Lloyd Jones. I’m really enjoying the performances and the leadership qualities he is putting in because we always knew that was in Lloyd Jones.”
